ast.name: error
ast.source: Iconv-lite warning: decode()-ing strings is deprecated. Refer to https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding
ast.target: Iconv-lite 警告：对字符串进行 decode() 已弃用。请参见 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding

ast.name: error
ast.source: iconv-lite warning: javascript files use encoding different from utf-8. See https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings for more info.
ast.target: iconv-lite 警告：javascript 文件使用了不同于 utf-8 的编码。更多信息请参见 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
fs-extra: Using the preserveTimestamps option in 32-bit node is not recommended;

    see https://github.com/jprichardson/node-fs-extra/issues/269
ast.target:
fs-extra：在 32 位 node 中不建议使用 preserveTimestamps 选项；

    参见 https://github.com/jprichardson/node-fs-extra/issues/269

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Since Acorn 8.0.0, options.ecmaVersion is required.
Defaulting to 2020, but this will stop working in the future.
ast.target:
自 Acorn 8.0.0 起，必须设置 options.ecmaVersion。
当前默认使用 2020，但未来将不再生效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ⚠️ Please configure Qiniu Image Uploader or disable it
ast.target: ⚠️ 请配置七牛图片上传器或将其禁用

ast.name: description
ast.source: Node wrapper for Qiniu Resource (Cloud) Storage API
ast.target: 七牛资源（云）存储 API 的 Node 封装

ast.name: description
ast.source: Help in opening URLs (mostly HTTP) in a complex world — basic and digest authentication, redirections, cookies and more.
ast.target: 帮助在复杂环境中打开 URL（主要是 HTTP）——基本与摘要认证、重定向、Cookie 等。
